Class HotelService

java.lang.Object
pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.service.HotelService
public class HotelService extends Object
Service layer encapsulating hotel business logic.

Provides safe operations for check-in, checkout and read-only queries. The class delegates storage to Hotel and room-level operations to Room.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    HotelService(Hotel hotel)
    Constructs a service for the provided hotel.

  • Constructor Details

    • HotelService

      public HotelService(Hotel hotel)
      Constructs a service for the provided hotel.
      Parameters:
      hotel - hotel instance to operate on (must not be null)

  • Method Details

    • checkin

      public boolean checkin(int roomNumber, List<Guest> guests, int days)
      Convenience check-in without explicit check-in date or notes. Uses the current date as check-in date and empty notes.
      Parameters:
      roomNumber - room number to check into
      guests - list of guests (firstName/lastName pairs)
      days - planned number of days
      Returns:
      true if check-in succeeded, false otherwise (invalid room, not available or over capacity)

    • checkin

      public boolean checkin(int roomNumber, List<Guest> guests, LocalDate checkinDate, int days, String notes)
      Full check-in operation with explicit check-in date and optional notes.

      Validations performed: - room exists, - room is available (not currently occupied), - number of guests does not exceed room capacity.

      Parameters:
      roomNumber - room number to check into
      guests - list of guests
      checkinDate - start date of the stay
      days - planned number of days
      notes - optional notes (may be empty)
      Returns:
      true when check-in completed successfully; false on validation failure

    • checkout

      public double checkout(int roomNumber)
      Performs checkout for the given room.

      If the room does not exist or is not occupied the method returns 0.0. Otherwise it delegates to Room.checkout() which clears occupancy and returns the total amount due.

      Parameters:
      roomNumber - room number to check out
      Returns:
      total amount due for the stay or 0.0 when checkout failed / room not occupied

    • view

      public String view(int roomNumber)
      Returns a textual view of the room state.
      Parameters:
      roomNumber - number of the room to view
      Returns:
      room description string or "Room not found" if the room does not exist

    • listAllRooms

      public List<Room> listAllRooms()
      Lists all rooms in the hotel.
      Returns:
      list of all Room instances (may be empty)

    • listAvailableRooms

      public List<Room> listAvailableRooms()
      Lists all currently available (vacant) rooms.
      Returns:
      list of available Room instances (may be empty)

    • listPrices

      public List<Double> listPrices()
      Returns current nightly prices for all rooms.
      Returns:
      list of prices (double) for each room; order corresponds to listAllRooms()

    • getHotel

      public Hotel getHotel()
      Exposes the underlying Hotel instance.
      Returns:
      hotel operated by this service
